6 #include <arcane/IItemFamily.h>
7 
8 #include "ArcGeoSim/Appli/IAppServiceMng.h"
9 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Geometry/IGeometryMng.h"
10 #include <arcane/IParallelMng.h>
11 
12 using namespace Arcane;
13 
14 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
15 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
16 
17 void InterpolatorTesterService::init() {
18 }
19 
20 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
21 
22 int InterpolatorTesterService::test() {
23  IInterpolator* interpolator = options()->interpolator();
24  interpolator->init();
25 
26  // Source field
27  info() << "Creating source and target fields";
28  VariableBuildInfo vb_source(mesh(),
29  "Source",
30  allFaces().itemFamily()->name(),
31  IVariable::PPrivate | IVariable::PTemporary | IVariable::PNoRestore);
32  VariableFaceReal source(vb_source);
33 
34  // Target field
35  VariableBuildInfo vb_target(mesh(),
36  "Target",
37  allCells().itemFamily()->name(),
38  IVariable::PPrivate | IVariable::PTemporary | IVariable::PNoRestore);
39  VariableCellReal3 target(vb_target);
40 
41  // (Interpolated) exact field
42  VariableBuildInfo vb_exact(mesh(),
43  "Exact",
44  allCells().itemFamily()->name(),
45  IVariable::PPrivate | IVariable::PTemporary | IVariable::PNoRestore);
46  VariableCellReal3 exact(vb_exact);
47 
48 
49  // Retrieve analytical field from configuration file
50  info() << "Parsing analytical field";
51  IAppServiceMng* app_service_mng = IAppServiceMng::instance(subDomain()->serviceMng());
52 
53 
54  AnalyticalVectorField v;
55  // x
56  v(0) = options()->continuousField().x();
57  v(0)->init() ;
58  // y
59  v(1) = options()->continuousField().y();
60  v(1)->init() ;
61  // z
62  v(2) = options()->continuousField().z();
63  v(2)->init() ;
64 
65  // Compute relevant geometrical properties
66  info() << "Compute relevant geometrical properties";
67  IGeometryMng* geometry_service = app_service_mng->find<IGeometryMng>(true);
68  geometry_service->addItemGroupProperty(ownCells(), interpolator->getCellGeometricProperties(), IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
69  geometry_service->addItemGroupProperty(allFaces(), interpolator->getFaceGeometricProperties(), IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
70  geometry_service->update(IGeometryPolicy::nullPolicy());
71 
72  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& cell_centers =
73  geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(ownCells(), IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
74  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& face_centers =
75  geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(allFaces(), IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
76 
77  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable& face_normals =
78  geometry_service->getReal3VariableProperty(allFaces(), IGeometryProperty::PNormal);
79 
80  const IGeometryMng::RealVariable& cell_measures =
81  geometry_service->getRealVariableProperty(ownCells(), IGeometryProperty::PMeasure);
82 
83  // Evaluate analytical field
84  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface, allFaces()) {
85  const Face F = *iface;
86 
87  const Real3& xF = face_centers[F];
88  const Real3& nF = face_normals[F];
89 
90  Real vn_xF = 0;
91  for(Integer i = 0; i < mesh()->dimension(); i++)
92  vn_xF += v(i)->eval(xF.x,xF.y,xF.z) * nF[i];
93 
94  // WARNING: the Euclidean norm of the normal coincides with the
95  // measure of the face
96  // source[F] = face_measures[F] * vn_xF;
97  source[F] = vn_xF;
98  }
99  source.synchronize();
100 
101  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell, ownCells()) {
102  const Cell T = *icell;
103  Real3& exact_T = exact[T];
104  const Real3 xT = cell_centers[T];
105 
106  for(Integer i = 0; i < mesh()->dimension(); i++)
107  exact_T[i] = v(i)->eval(xT.x,xT.y,xT.z);
108  }
109 
110  // Interpolate fields
111  info() << "Interpolating fields";
112  interpolator->setSourceField(&source);
113  interpolator->setTargetField(&target);
114 
115  interpolator->interpolate();
116  target.synchronize();
117 
118  // Compute error
119  Real erl2 = 0;
120  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell, ownCells()) {
121  const Cell T = *icell;
122  Real3 diff_T = exact[T] - target[T];
123  erl2 += cell_measures[T] * pow(diff_T.abs(), 2);
124  }
125  erl2 = ownCells().mesh()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum, erl2);
126  erl2 = sqrt(erl2);
127  info() << "erl2 : " << erl2;
128 
129  // Compute number of cells
130  Integer nunkw = ownCells().size();
131  nunkw = mesh()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum, nunkw);
132  info() << "nunkw : " << nunkw;
133 
134  return 1 ;
135 }
136 
137 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
138 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
139 
140 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_INTERPOLATORTESTER(InterpolatorTester,InterpolatorTesterService);

Update property values for all ItemGroups on all meshes.

Definition: InterpolatorTesterService.h:23
InterpolatorTesterService::AnalyticalVectorField
boost::numeric::ublas::bounded_vector< IFunctionR3vR1 *, 3 > AnalyticalVectorField
Analytical vector field.
